wifi.description: Scan networks and connect the device

errors.pageNotFoundMessage: The page you requested does not exist or is no longer available on this device.
errors.genericMessage: An unexpected error interrupted the web interface.
errors.label: Error

backendErrors.missing_required_fields: Some information is missing. Please check the form and try again.
backendErrors.request_body_read_failed: The device could not process the request. Please try again.
backendErrors.invalid_json: The device received data in an unexpected format. Please try again.
backendErrors.clear_settings_failed: The device could not reset the saved settings. Please try again.
backendErrors.missing_api_key: Please enter an API key before saving.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Store the market data API key used by the ticker firmware. The value is sent directly to the device configuration endpoint.
apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.note: Use a key with enough quota for frequent polling. The current firmware expects the API key as a plain string.
apiKey.saveSuccess: The API key has been saved successfully!
apiKey.saveError: An error occurred while saving the API key
apiKey.confirmMessage: Store this API key on the device and replace the current value?

wifi.title: Connect to WiFi
wifi.description: Join the device to your local network so it can fetch market data and keep the LED matrix updated.
wifi.note: The device will try the credentials immediately and disable its temporary hotspot after a successful connection.
wifi.connectedMessage: The microcontroller connected to {ssid} and is available at {hostname} and {ip}.
wifi.connectError: An error occurred while connecting to the Wi-Fi network
wifi.refreshError: An error occurred while refreshing the SSID list
wifi.connectConfirmMessage: Send the selected credentials for {ssid} to the device and switch it to that network?

apSetup.title: Connect to WiFi
apSetup.connectConfirmMessage: Send the selected credentials for {ssid} to the device, connect to that network, and disable the temporary hotspot?

settings.title: Ticker Settings
settings.description: Fine-tune what the LED matrix shows and how aggressively it scrolls through the market data.
settings.visibilityDescription: Choose which market metrics rotate on the matrix.
settings.formattingDescription: Tweak the number formatting and playback intensity for the matrix.

cryptoCoin.label: Ticker coin
cryptoCoin.note: Selects which coin the device fetches and applies the matching accent style in the web interface.
cryptoCoin.bitcoinMeta: Bitcoin market data with orange accents
cryptoCoin.kaspaMeta: Kaspa market data with turquoise accents

settings.saveSuccess: The settings have been saved successfully!
settings.saveError: An error occurred while saving the settings
settings.resetInfoMessage: The device settings were cleared and the firmware is restarting.
settings.resetError: An error occurred while resetting the settings
settings.saveConfirmMessage: Save the current ticker settings to the device?
settings.resetConfirmMessage: Clear the saved settings and restart the firmware?

currentPrice.label: Current price
currentPrice.description: The live price currently fetched for the selected coin.

priceChange.label: Price change
priceChange.description: How much the price moved compared to the previous period.

marketCap.label: Market cap
marketCap.description: The total market value of the selected coin.

dailyHighLow.label: Daily high / low
dailyHighLow.description: The highest and lowest price reached today.

yearHighLow.label: Year high / low
yearHighLow.description: The highest and lowest price reached over the last 52 weeks.

openPrice.label: Open price
openPrice.description: The price when the current period opened.

volume.label: Volume
volume.description: The trading volume for the current period.

formatType.label: Thousands separator
formatType.note: The formatting updates on the next API refresh.

matrixIntensity.label: Matrix intensity
matrixIntensity.note: Controls the brightness of the matrix modules.

scrollSpeed.label: Scroll speed
scrollSpeed.note: Controls how fast each text block moves across the display.
